title: Amtech S5551 Post box - white
features: DURABLE AND WATERPROOF: This attractive white post box is made from quality pressed steel with a waterproof epoxy powder coating
EASY TO MOUNT: With dimensions of 355mm (width) x 100mm (depth) x 355mm (height), the letter box has pre-drilled fixing holes for easy mounting
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee.
